name: 9mm-v3-position-manager
description: Auto-rebalancing position manager for 9mm v3 (Uniswap v3 fork) on PulseChain

scripts.reset-wallet: rm -f .wallet.json; echo 'Wallet cleared — re-import via dashboard on next start'
scripts.clean: npm run stop 2>/dev/null; npm run reset-wallet && rm -f .bot-config.json .epoch-cache.json rebalance_log.json tmp/event-cache*.json && echo 'Cleaned: server stopped, wallet, bot config, epoch cache, rebalance log, event cache' && echo 'TIP: Also clear browser localStorage & cookies via the Settings gear icon in the dashboard.'
scripts.lint: eslint src/ test/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --max-warnings 0 && stylelint public/*.css && markdownlint-cli2 README.md CLAUDE.md
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src/ test/ server.js bot.js public/dashboard-*.js eslint-rules/ --fix && stylelint public/*.css --fix && markdownlint-cli2 --fix README.md CLAUDE.md
scripts.nuke: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && echo 'Nuked node_modules + package-lock.json — run npm install to reinstall'
